purpose: Summarize the next validation step for the checkout pricing regression.

sections.title: Purpose
sections.content: Summarize the next validation step for the checkout pricing regression.

sections.title: Project
sections.content: critical-checkout-regression: Cognitive repo for a critical VIP discount regression

sections.title: Goals
sections.content: - [Active] Restore checkout pricing consistency: Investigate and close a critical regression affecting VIP discount totals in checkout.

sections.title: Tasks
sections.content:
- [Ready] Ship the fix and regression coverage: Lock the corrected pricing rule with executable tests.
- [InProgress] Validate the real cause inside discount composition: Confirm whether the defect is discount duplication, tax logic, or rate normalization.
- [Done] Reproduce and isolate the incorrect VIP total: Capture the failing business scenario and identify the suspicious pricing path.

sections.title: Hypotheses
sections.content:
- [UnderEvaluation] (82%) The VIP discount is applied twice when coupon handling is enabled, producing an undercharged checkout total.
- [UnderEvaluation] (76%) The defect is in discount composition and can be stabilized by keeping the stacked rate explicit before downstream calculations.
- [UnderEvaluation] (45%) The checkout total drift comes from tax or subtotal rounding rather than duplicated discount logic.

sections.title: Decisions
sections.content: - [Accepted] Treat discount composition as the primary fix surface: Evidence points to the combined VIP-plus-coupon path, so the remediation should be applied in discount composition before chasing tax logic.

sections.title: Evidence
sections.content:
- [Observation] (89%) Incident reconstruction identifies VIP coupon path as the only risky scenario: The incident summary narrows the failure to VIP checkout when promotional coupon input is present; regular checkout is not implicated.
- [Document] (84%) Code inspection shows discount composition as the unstable area: The pricing function composes VIP and coupon discounts in one accumulation path, which is the highest-risk location for duplicated application or unstable rates.
